title: How many people visited the Great Exhibition of 1851?

meanings.usage: 用于描述不寻常、令人惊叹的事物
指公开展出物品供人参观的活动
指经济活动中获得的利益
修饰可数名词，表示多样性
作名词时指展示；作动词时指展示或显示
指用交通工具运输人或物
表示从一边到另一边的动作
指将某物从一地移到另一地

meanings.meaning: 燃烧（burn的过去式/过去分词）

meanings.usage: 用于形容令人愉悦或惊叹的事物

examples.en: The Crystal Palace was made of iron and glass.
examples.zh: 水晶宫由铁和玻璃建成。

phrases.usage: 许多；大量（修饰可数名词）

examples.en: A great many goods were sent to the exhibition.
examples.zh: 大量商品被送往展览会展出。

examples.en: There were six million visitors in all.
Steam boats carried thousands of visitors across the Channel.
examples.zh: 汽船把成千上万的游客运送过英吉利海峡。

examples.en: On arriving in England, they were taken to the Crystal Palace.
examples.zh: 一到英国，他们就被带到水晶宫。

examples.en: The profits were used to build museums and colleges.
examples.zh: 展览的利润用来建造博物馆和学院。

examples.en: The Crystal Palace was different from all other buildings.
examples.zh: 水晶宫不同于所有其他建筑。

phrases.usage: 大量；许多（修饰不可数名词）

examples.en: There was also a great deal of machinery on display.
travelling was not as easy as it is today
examples.zh: 旅行不像今天这样方便

grammar.title: 被动语态（一般过去时）
grammar.definition: 表示主语是动作的承受者，谓语用be+过去分词形式
grammar.structure: 主语 + was/were + 过去分词 + (by + 施动者)
grammar.usage: 当强调动作承受者或不知道动作执行者时使用被动语态

examples.en: The Crystal Palace was built in Hyde Park.
A great many goods were sent to the exhibition.
examples.zh: 大量商品被送往展览会。

examples.en: They were taken to the Crystal Palace by train.
examples.zh: 他们乘火车被带到水晶宫。

grammar.title: 让步状语从句
grammar.definition: 表示虽然/尽管某种相反的情况存在
grammar.structure: Though/Although + 主语 + 动词，主句
grammar.usage: 用来引出让步或对比的情况

examples.en: Though in those days travelling was not as easy as it is today, steam boats carried thousands of visitors.
examples.zh: 虽然那时候旅行不像今天这样方便，汽船还是运送了成千上万的游客。

grammar.title: There be 句型的过去时
grammar.definition: 表示过去某地存在某人或某物
grammar.structure: There was/were + 主语 + 地点/时间

examples.en: There was also a great deal of machinery on display.
There were six million visitors in all.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + was/were + 过去分词 + 地点/时间

original.en: The Crystal Palace was built in Hyde Park for the Great Exhibition of 1851.
original.zh: 水晶宫建在海德公园，用于1851年的世博会。

imitations.en: Many schools were built in this area.
imitations.zh: 这个地区建了很多学校。

sentencePatterns.pattern: There were/was + 数量 + 主语 + in all

original.en: There were six million visitors in all.

imitations.en: There were 500 students in this school in all.
imitations.zh: 这所学校总共有500名学生。

imitations.en: There was a lot of food in the restaurant.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + was/were + used to + 动词原形

original.en: The profits were used to build museums and colleges.
original.zh: 展览的利润用来建造博物馆和学院。

imitations.en: The money was used to help the poor.
This room is used to hold meetings.

sentencePatterns.pattern: Though + 主语 + 动词, 主语 + 动词

original.en: Though in those days travelling was not as easy as it is today, steam boats carried thousands of visitors across the Channel.
original.zh: 虽然那时候旅行不像今天这样方便，汽船还是运送了成千上万的游客穿过英吉利海峡。

imitations.en: Though it was raining, we still went out.
imitations.zh: 虽然下雨了，我们还是出去了。

imitations.en: Though she was tired, she continued working.
imitations.zh: 虽然她累了，她继续工作。
